items.placeName: Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa

facebook.caption: Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa earns its 4.8-star reputation the honest way: bright, airy bungalows and beachfront villas that put you right at the water's edge, two open-air restaurants where the breeze does half the work, and a spa to round out those sun-tired limbs. It's a modest resort in the best sense, relaxed, personal, and genuinely pretty. Practical tip: book a beachfront villa early, they sell out fast during peak season (November to April). A lovely base for first-time visitors to Phu Quoc.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the light pour into those beachfront villas and it's easy to see why guests keep coming back. Open-air dining, swaying palms, spa days, and that soft Phu Quoc coastline just steps away. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa keeps things beautifully simple, and it works.

instagram.caption: Beachfront bungalows, open-air dining, and a spa that earns its keep after a long day in the sun. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa is quietly one of the best stays on the island. Rated 4.8 from 935 reviews, and it shows. Book a villa early if you can.
instagram.video_caption: Bright villas, sea breeze dining, and that Phu Quoc coastline doing what it does best. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa is the kind of place that makes you extend your stay.

tiktok.caption: Beachfront villas, open-air restaurants, and a 4.8 rating that actually makes sense. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa is the real deal. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #BeachResort #IslandLife

scenes: Spa time after a beach day
Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa
video_script.cta: Book your villa before it's gone

facebook.caption: With a 4.8/5 rating across more than 7,500 reviews, Meliá Vinpearl Phu Quoc is consistently one of the top-rated stays on the island. Sitting along the peaceful Bai Dai area near Cửa Cạn, it puts you away from the busier southern crowds while keeping Phu Quoc's best beaches and attractions within reach. Guests rave about the resort-style facilities, attentive service, and the kind of relaxed luxury that makes you forget schedules exist. Practical tip: the Bai Dai stretch tends to be quieter in the mornings, so an early beach walk before breakfast is absolutely worth it.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun climb over the Bai Dai coastline from the grounds of Meliá Vinpearl Phu Quoc. Those pool views, those palm-lined walkways, that unhurried resort energy. This is what a proper island escape actually looks like, and nearly 7,600 guests agree.

instagram.caption: Tucked along the serene Bai Dai coast near Cửa Cạn, Meliá Vinpearl Phu Quoc earns its 4.8/5 with 7,500+ reviews the honest way. Lush grounds, resort-quality facilities, and a pace that feels genuinely restful. Pro tip: grab that early morning beach walk before the day begins.
instagram.video_caption: Palm trees, glassy pools, and the quiet end of Phu Quoc all to yourself. Meliá Vinpearl Phu Quoc is giving full resort fantasy, and the 7,500+ happy guests are proof.

tiktok.caption: 4.8 stars. 7,500+ reviews. The quiet Bai Dai side of Phu Quoc. Meliá Vinpearl just hits different. #PhuQuoc #MeliaVinpearl #VietnamTravel #LuxuryHotel

video_script.hook: 4.8 stars on Phu Quoc's quiet coast
scenes: Bai Dai area, far from the crowds
